name: Boodle Fight
description: A festive Filipino feast served kamayan-style with grilled meats, seafood, rice, and traditional sides perfect for sharing.

name: Kakakanin Platter
description: An assorted platter of traditional Filipino kakanin and native delicacies made with rice, coconut, and sweet local flavors.

name: Sizzling Bangus Sisig
description: Savory chopped milkfish served sizzling hot with onions, peppers, and bold Filipino seasonings.

name: Sizzling Crispy Sisig
description: Crispy pork sisig served on a sizzling plate with rich savory flavors and a satisfying crunch in every bite.
